overview: A stunning 4K wallpaper gallery app where users can browse, search, and download luxury car, Avengers, Spider-Man, and lifestyle wallpapers. Features category filters, full-screen previews, and the ability to save favorites.
features: Browse wallpapers by category: Luxury Cars, Avengers, Spider-Man, 4K Nature
Full-screen wallpaper preview with download to device
Search bar to find wallpapers by name or keyword
Responsive mobile-first design for phone, tablet, desktop
